title: Qelayah #7041
definition:
Kelaiah = "Jehovah has dishonoured"

 1) a Levite who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra
    1a) also 'Kelita'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kelaiah = "Jehovah has dishonoured"

 1) a Levite who had a foreign wife in the time of Ezra
    1a) also 'Kelita'

    NASB:  a Levite, the same as 7042
